zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Byron於1327年出生在英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林時，她的父親Sir James Byron27歲，母親Elizabeth Bernake25歲。她於大約1344年與Thomas de Mortimer在英國賀福爾維格莫結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年在英國越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Byron于1327年出生在英国藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林时，她的父亲Sir James Byron27岁，母亲Elizabeth Bernake25岁。她于大约1344年与Thomas de Mortimer在英国賀福爾維格莫结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年在英国越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Byron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Byram (Yorkshire), named with Old English bȳrum ‘at the cattle sheds’, dative plural of bȳre ‘byre’. This name has occasionally been adopted as a Jewish surname, presumably as an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Byron was born in 1327, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir James Byron, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth Bernake, was 25. She married Thomas de Mortimer about 1344, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. She died in 1360, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Byron est née en 1327, à Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir James Byron, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Bernake, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Mortimer environ 1344, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1360, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Byron 1327 in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James Byron 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Bernake 25. Sie hat um 1344 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England Thomas de Mortimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1360 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Byronが1327年にイギリスランカシュアイアアシュトン-ウンデル-リンで生まれた時，父Sir James Byronは27歳，母Elizabeth Bernakeは25歳であった。約1344年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーでThomas de Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年にイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Byron(이)가 1327년 영국 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Byron(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Bernake(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1344년 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 Thomas de Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 영국 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Byron nasceu em 1327, em Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir James Byron, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Bernake, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Mortimer aproximadamente 1344, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1360, em Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos.

ro.Bashall Eaves, Mitton, West Riding, York: Great Mitton, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Byron родилась в 1327 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir James Byron было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bernake, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Mortimer около 1344 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1360 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет.
